description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CPU Release Build that triggers on pull requests to main, pushes to main, and manual workflow dispatches. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on a linux.4xlarge host with a matrix of Python versions 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10, checks out the repository, sets up the environment, installs dependencies, builds FBGEMM_GPU for CPU, and uploads the built wheel as a GHA artifact. The test_and_publish_artifact job runs on a linux.4xlarge host with the same Python version matrix, checks out the repository, sets up the environment, installs dependencies, downloads the built wheel artifact, tests FBGEMM_GPU on GPU, and pushes the package to PyPI if the workflow is not triggered by a pull request or push.
